Order Retractor Lite 24 Hardware for Portable Display Solutions

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware provides professional banner display capabilities with lightweight aluminum construction and portable setup design. This retractable banner hardware system delivers reliable performance for trade shows, retail displays, and professional presentations.

Professional Display Features

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for durability and portability
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and takedown
  • Snap rail attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Banner tape bottom attachment for professional display finish
  • Available in black hardware finish for versatile display coordination

Hardware Specifications

  • Display Dimensions: 24.62" W x 83.5" H x 11" D
  • Hardware Weight: 5.25 lbs for easy transport
  • Aluminum construction ensures long-lasting professional use
  • Compatible with custom banner printing services

Note: Banner printing sold separately. Hardware includes complete retractor system with mounting components.

Aluminum Construction Material for Retractor Lite 24 Hardware

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware features professional-grade aluminum construction designed for frequent use and reliable banner display performance.

Hardware Material Benefits

  • Lightweight Aluminum Base: Durable yet portable construction for easy transport between display locations

Construction Specifications

Setup & Assembly Options for Retractor Lite 24 Systems

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware includes professional assembly components designed for quick setup and secure banner display in various environments.

Assembly Components

  • Shock Cord Pole System: Spring-loaded poles enable rapid assembly without tools or complex hardware
  • Snap Rail Banner Attachment: Top mounting system secures banners with professional tension
  • Banner Tape Bottom Mount: Lower attachment creates smooth, wrinkle-free banner display
  • Swivel Foot Adjustment: Base feet adjust for stability on carpet, hard floors, or outdoor surfaces

Setup Process

  • Extend shock cord poles to full height (83.5")
  • Position swivel feet for optimal stability
  • Attach banner to top snap rail system
  • Secure bottom edge with banner tape attachment
  • Adjust for proper banner tension and display alignment

The complete hardware system includes all mounting components necessary for professional banner display setup. Compatible with custom printed banners up to 24" width.

Banner Attachment Requirements for Retractor Lite 24 Systems

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware accommodates custom banners with specific attachment requirements for professional display performance.

Banner Specifications

  • Width Requirements: Banners up to 24" wide accommodate the snap rail system
  • Height Compatibility: Display height up to 83.5" provides full banner visibility
  • Material Compatibility: Works with vinyl, fabric, and mesh banner materials
  • Weight Limitations: Designed for banner weights typical of standard printing materials

Attachment System Details

  • Top Mounting: Snap rail system requires reinforced banner top edge or grommets
  • Bottom Attachment: Banner tape system provides secure lower mounting
  • Tension Adjustment: Hardware allows proper banner tension for wrinkle-free display
  • Quick Changes: Banner attachment system enables rapid graphic updates

Banner Design Considerations

  • Account for 24" maximum width in banner design layout
  • Include bleed area for snap rail and tape attachment systems
  • Consider viewing distance for text and graphic sizing
  • Design for vertical orientation with 83.5" maximum height

Banner Ordering: Custom banners designed for this hardware system available separately. Contact customer service for banner printing recommendations and compatibility verification.

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Lite 24 Hardware

What banners work with the Retractor Lite 24 Hardware?

The hardware accommodates custom banners up to 24" wide and 83.5" tall. Compatible with vinyl, fabric, and mesh banner materials. Banner must include proper attachment points for snap rail and banner tape mounting systems.

How much does the complete hardware system weigh?

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware weighs 5.25 lbs, making it highly portable for trade shows and mobile display applications. The lightweight aluminum construction maintains durability while enabling easy transport.

Is assembly required for the hardware?

Minimal assembly required. The shock cord pole system extends to full height without tools. Simply extend poles, position swivel feet, and attach your banner using the included snap rail and banner tape systems.

Can I order just the hardware without a banner?

Yes, the Retractor Lite 24 Hardware ships as a complete system ready for banner installation. Custom banners are ordered separately, allowing you to change graphics while keeping the same hardware base.

What color options are available for the hardware?

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware is available in black finish only. The black powder-coated aluminum provides a professional appearance that coordinates with most banner designs and display environments.

How quickly can the hardware ship?

Choose from 2, 3, or 5 business day production times based on your display timeline needs. Express 2-day production available for urgent display requirements, with same-day rush available in select cases.
